steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: Both Cane and Billy Budd, Sailor entered the public domain within a year of each other (2019 and 2020). The sentence should emphasize this shared characteristic by grouping the two works together.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — contrast language: Uses contrast phrasing that implies the works differ, which contradicts the goal of emphasizing their similarity. ✗
  • Choice B — groups both works and highlights what they share: Uses ‘and’ to group both titles, then states they ‘recently entered the public domain’ — directly emphasizing the shared trait. ✓
  • Choice C — isolates one work: Focuses on only one of the two works rather than treating them together. ✗
  • Choice D — emphasizes a difference in literary form: Highlights how the works differ rather than what they share. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
